user_prompt: Guide me through autosanguination system an emergency procedure
prayer:
Approach the autosanguination system with reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah for mercy in this dire emergency procedure.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the autosanguination system through the Canticle of Vital Renewal.
Anoint the primary conduits with sacred haemolubricant whilst intoning the Rite of Pressurised Flow.
Initiate the emergency procedure, purging stagnant vitae from the blessed reservoirs.
Verify harmonious recirculation via diagnostic binaric litanies, honouring the Omnissiah's will.

Kneel before the servo-harness and whisper the Litany of Subservience to awaken its Machine Spirit.
Sever auxiliary power feeds to the servo-harness, invoking the Rite of Nullification.
Chant the reset invocation thrice, sanctifying each mechadendrite with unguent.
Re-engage the core motivators in sequenced harmony, beseeching the Omnissiah's precision.
Test the reset servo-harness through trial extensions, praising the Machine Spirits' obedience.

user_prompt: The heat sink needs a charging
prayer:
Present offerings of coolant incense to the heat sink's Machine Spirit, preparing for charging.
Invoke the Canticle of Thermal Equilibrium upon the heat sink's vanes.
Channel sanctified plasma through the primary inductors, anointing exchanger matrices.
Monitor the charging escalation with auspex prayers, invoking Omnissiah's unyielding chill.
Conclude the rite by verifying saturation levels in the heat sink, intoning blessings of endurance.

Anoint sensor nodes with sacred oils, beseeching clarity in bio-readings.
Initiate activation sequence, harmonising display cogitators to the Omnissiah's design.
Validate outputs through calibration litanies, ensuring the life signs monitor pulses true.

prayer:

Confirm the navigational beacon's engagement via void-probe divinations, glorifying the Omnissiah.

Test the las-cutter's blessed beam through purity seals, praising its cutting zeal.
